name: scopeparity-workspace
description: ScopeParity local Google OAuth scope-drift scanner and launch evidence compiler

scripts.test:distribution: pnpm --filter @scopeparity/core build && node scripts/submit-indexnow.mjs --dry-run && node scripts/public-examples.mjs --check
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm test:distribution && pnpm test:e2e
